contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
(** Vertical and horizontal composition of squares *)

Local Definition concat_square_vert
    (p : ab0 @ b01 = a01 @ ab1)
    (q : bc0 @ c01 = b01 @ bc1)
    : (ab0 @ bc0) @ c01 = a01 @ (ab1 @ bc1).

Local Definition concat_square_hor
    (p : a01 @ ab1 = ab0 @ b01)
    (q : b01 @ bc1 = bc0 @ c01)
    : a01 @ (ab1 @ bc1) = (ab0 @ bc0) @ c01.
(** We give custom names to the following equivalences: *)
(** We also need this inverse.  Using a Notation slows things down a lot. *)
Definition rlucancel_inv {X} {a b : X} {p q : a = b} := (@rlucancel X a b p q)^-1.
(** This special case of [equiv_path_ind] comes up a lot. *)

Definition equiv_path_ind_rlucancel {X} (a b : X) (p : a = b)
  (P : forall (q : a = b), p @ 1 = 1 @ q -> Type)
  (r : P p (rlucancel 1))
  : forall (q : a = b) (s : p @ 1 = 1 @ q), P q s.

goals.conclusion: forall (q : a = b) (s : p @ 1 = 1 @ q), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, p @ 1 = 1 @ q -> Type

goals.conclusion: forall (q : a = b) (s : p @ 1 = 1 @ q), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, p @ 1 = 1 @ q -> Type

goals.conclusion: P p ((fun b0 : a = b => rlucancel) p 1)

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, p @ 1 = 1 @ q -> Type

contents: (** This special case of [equiv_path_ind] comes up a lot. *)

Definition equiv_path_ind_lrucancel {X} (a b : X) (p : a = b)
  (P : forall (q : a = b), 1 @ p = q @ 1 -> Type)
  (r : P p (lrucancel 1))
  : forall (q : a = b) (s : 1 @ p = q @ 1), P q s.

goals.conclusion: forall (q : a = b) (s : 1 @ p = q @ 1), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, 1 @ p = q @ 1 -> Type

goals.conclusion: forall (q : a = b) (s : 1 @ p = q @ 1), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, 1 @ p = q @ 1 -> Type

goals.conclusion: P p ((fun b0 : a = b => lrucancel) p 1)

hypotheses.type: forall q : a = b, 1 @ p = q @ 1 -> Type

contents: (** Interaction of the above equivalences with square composition. *)

goals.conclusion:
(rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 theta =
whiskerR theta 1 @ rlucancel 1

(rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 theta =
whiskerR theta 1 @ rlucancel 1

(lrucancel 1 [I] lrucancel 1) @ whiskerR theta 1 =
whiskerL 1 theta @ lrucancel 1

(lrucancel 1 [I] lrucancel 1) @ whiskerR theta 1 =
whiskerL 1 theta @ lrucancel 1

contents:
Definition rlucancel_sHs_1 {X} {a b : X} (p : a = b)
  : (rlucancel 1 [I] rlucancel 1) = rlucancel (idpath p).

goals.conclusion: rlucancel 1 [I] rlucancel 1 = rlucancel 1
rlucancel 1 [I] rlucancel 1 = rlucancel 1

contents:
Definition lrucancel_sVs_1 {X} {a b : X} (p : a = b)
  : (lrucancel 1 [-] lrucancel 1) = lrucancel (idpath p).

goals.conclusion: lrucancel 1 [-] lrucancel 1 = lrucancel 1
lrucancel 1 [-] lrucancel 1 = lrucancel 1

contents:
Definition ulnat {X} {a b : X} {u v : a = b} (p : u = v)
  : whiskerL 1 p @ concat_1p v = concat_1p u @ p.

goals.conclusion: whiskerL 1 p @ concat_1p v = concat_1p u @ p
whiskerL 1 p @ concat_1p v = concat_1p u @ p
whiskerL 1 1 @ concat_1p u = concat_1p u @ 1

contents:
Definition urnat {X} {a b : X} {u v : a = b} (p : u = v)
  : whiskerR p 1 @ concat_p1 v = concat_p1 u @ p.

goals.conclusion: whiskerR p 1 @ concat_p1 v = concat_p1 u @ p
whiskerR p 1 @ concat_p1 v = concat_p1 u @ p
whiskerR 1 1 @ concat_p1 u = concat_p1 u @ 1

contents: (** Exchange law for whiskering on the left and on the right. *)

Definition wlrnat {X} {a b c : X} {u v : a = b} {x y : b = c} p q
  : whiskerL u p @ whiskerR q y = whiskerR q x @ whiskerL v p.

goals.conclusion: whiskerL u p @ whiskerR q y = whiskerR q x @ whiskerL v p
whiskerL u p @ whiskerR q y = whiskerR q x @ whiskerL v p

contents: (** Eckmann-Hilton.  This is also proved as [eckmann_hilton] in PathGroupoids.v, but we need this particular proof in order to prove the syllepsis. *)

Theorem eh {X} {a : X} (p q : idpath a = idpath a)
  : p @ q = q @ p.

goals.conclusion: p @ q = q @ p
p @ q = q @ p
p @ q = whiskerR q 1 @ whiskerL 1 p
whiskerL 1 p @ whiskerR q 1 = whiskerR q 1 @ whiskerL 1 p

contents:
Local Definition eh_1p_gen {X} {a b : X} {u v : a = b} (p : u = v) {q} (theta : whiskerR p 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q)
  : (rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta))^ @ wlrnat 1 p @ rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1) @ concat_p1 q = concat_1p q.

goals.conclusion:
(((rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta))^ @ wlrnat 1 p) @ rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1)) @
concat_p1 q = concat_1p q

(((rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta))^ @ wlrnat 1 p) @ rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1)) @
concat_p1 q = concat_1p q

forall (q : u @ 1 = v @ 1) (theta : whiskerR p 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q),
(((rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta))^ @ wlrnat 1 p) @ rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1)) @
concat_p1 q = concat_1p q

(fun (q : u @ 1 = v @ 1) (s : whiskerR p 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (((rlucancel_inv (1 [-] s))^ @ wlrnat 1 p) @ rlucancel_inv (s [-] 1)) @
 concat_p1 q = concat_1p q) (whiskerR p 1) (rlucancel 1)

contents:
Definition eh_1p {X} {a : X} (p : idpath a = idpath a)
  : eh 1 p @ concat_p1 p = concat_1p p.

goals.conclusion: eh 1 p @ concat_p1 p = concat_1p p
eh 1 p @ concat_p1 p = concat_1p p

contents:
Local Definition eh_p1_gen {X} {a b : X} {u v : a = b} (p : u = v) {q} (theta : whiskerL 1 p @ 1 = 1 @ q)
  : (rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1))^ @ wlrnat p 1 @ rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta) @ concat_1p q = concat_p1 q.

goals.conclusion:
(((rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1))^ @ wlrnat p 1) @ rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta)) @
concat_1p q = concat_p1 q

(((rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1))^ @ wlrnat p 1) @ rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta)) @
concat_1p q = concat_p1 q

forall (q : 1 @ u = 1 @ v) (theta : whiskerL 1 p @ 1 = 1 @ q),
(((rlucancel_inv (theta [-] 1))^ @ wlrnat p 1) @ rlucancel_inv (1 [-] theta)) @
concat_1p q = concat_p1 q

(fun (q : 1 @ u = 1 @ v) (s : whiskerL 1 p @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (((rlucancel_inv (s [-] 1))^ @ wlrnat p 1) @ rlucancel_inv (1 [-] s)) @
 concat_1p q = concat_p1 q) (whiskerL 1 p) (rlucancel 1)

contents:
Definition eh_p1 {X} {a : X} (p : idpath a = idpath a)
  : eh p 1 @ concat_1p p = concat_p1 p.

goals.conclusion: eh p 1 @ concat_1p p = concat_p1 p
eh p 1 @ concat_1p p = concat_p1 p

contents:
Definition ehlnat {X} {a : X} (u : idpath a = idpath a) {x y} (p : x = y)
  : whiskerL u p @ eh u y = eh u x @ whiskerR p u.

goals.conclusion: whiskerL u p @ eh u y = eh u x @ whiskerR p u
whiskerL u p @ eh u y = eh u x @ whiskerR p u
whiskerL u 1 @ eh u x = eh u x @ whiskerR 1 u

contents:
Definition ehrnat {X} {a : X} {u v} (p : u = v) (x : idpath a = idpath a)
  : whiskerR p x @ eh v x = eh u x @ whiskerL x p.

goals.conclusion: whiskerR p x @ eh v x = eh u x @ whiskerL x p
whiskerR p x @ eh v x = eh u x @ whiskerL x p
whiskerR 1 x @ eh u x = eh u x @ whiskerL x 1

contents: (** Naturality of Eckmann-Hilton when the fixed path is 1. *)

Definition ehlnat_1p {X} {a : X} {u v : idpath a = idpath a} (p : u = v)
  : (ehlnat 1 p [I] urnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_1p u) _ = whiskerL _ (eh_1p v) @ ulnat p.

goals.conclusion:
(ehlnat 1 p [I] urnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_1p u) p =
whiskerL (whiskerL 1 p) (eh_1p v) @ ulnat p

(ehlnat 1 p [I] urnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_1p u) p =
whiskerL (whiskerL 1 p) (eh_1p v) @ ulnat p

(ehlnat 1 1 [I] urnat 1) @ whiskerR (eh_1p u) 1 =
whiskerL (whiskerL 1 1) (eh_1p u) @ ulnat 1

contents:
Definition ehrnat_p1 {X} {a : X} {u v : idpath a = idpath a} (p : u = v)
  : (ehrnat p 1 [I] ulnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_p1 u) _ = whiskerL _ (eh_p1 v) @ urnat p.

goals.conclusion:
(ehrnat p 1 [I] ulnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_p1 u) p =
whiskerL (whiskerR p 1) (eh_p1 v) @ urnat p

(ehrnat p 1 [I] ulnat p) @ whiskerR (eh_p1 u) p =
whiskerL (whiskerR p 1) (eh_p1 v) @ urnat p

(ehrnat 1 1 [I] ulnat 1) @ whiskerR (eh_p1 u) 1 =
whiskerL (whiskerR 1 1) (eh_p1 u) @ urnat 1

contents: (* These lemmas should probably be in the library in some form. *)

Local Definition concat_p_pp_pp_p {A} {u v x y : A} (p : u = v) (q : v = x) (r : x = y)
  : concat_p_pp p q r @ concat_pp_p p q r = 1.

goals.conclusion: concat_p_pp p q r @ concat_pp_p p q r = 1
concat_p_pp p q r @ concat_pp_p p q r = 1

contents:
Local Definition concat_pp_p_p_pp {A} {u v x y : A} (p : u = v) (q : v = x) (r : x = y)
  : concat_pp_p p q r @ concat_p_pp p q r = 1.

goals.conclusion: concat_pp_p p q r @ concat_p_pp p q r = 1
concat_pp_p p q r @ concat_p_pp p q r = 1

contents: (* These lemmas are in the library but with worse computational behavior. *)

Local Definition whiskerL_pp {A} {a b c : A} (u : a = b) {v w z : b = c} (p : v = w) (q : w = z)
  : whiskerL u (p @ q) = whiskerL u p @ whiskerL u q.

goals.conclusion: whiskerL u (p @ q) = whiskerL u p @ whiskerL u q
whiskerL u (p @ q) = whiskerL u p @ whiskerL u q

contents:
Local Definition whiskerR_pp {A} {a b c : A} {u v w : a = b} (z : b = c) (p : u = v) (q : v = w)
  : whiskerR (p @ q) z = whiskerR p z @ whiskerR q z.

goals.conclusion: whiskerR (p @ q) z = whiskerR p z @ whiskerR q z
whiskerR (p @ q) z = whiskerR p z @ whiskerR q z

contents: (** We now prove that [ulnat (p @ q)] suitably relates to [ulnat p] and [ulnat q]. *)

Definition ulnat_pp {X} {a b : X} {u v w : a = b} (p : u = v) (q : v = w)
  : ulnat p [-] ulnat q = whiskerR (whiskerL_pp _ p q)^ _ @ ulnat (p @ q).

goals.conclusion:
ulnat p [-] ulnat q =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp 1 p q)^ (concat_1p w) @ ulnat (p @ q)

ulnat p [-] ulnat q =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp 1 p q)^ (concat_1p w) @ ulnat (p @ q)

contents: (** We now prove that [urnat (p @ q)] suitably relates to [urnat p] and [urnat q]. *)

Definition urnat_pp {X} {a b : X} {u v w : a = b} (p : u = v) (q : v = w)
  : urnat p [-] urnat q = whiskerR (whiskerR_pp _ p q)^ _ @ urnat (p @ q).

goals.conclusion:
urnat p [-] urnat q =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp 1 p q)^ (concat_p1 w) @ urnat (p @ q)

urnat p [-] urnat q =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp 1 p q)^ (concat_p1 w) @ urnat (p @ q)

contents: (** We now prove that [ehlnat u (p @ q)] suitably relates to [ehlnat u p] and [ehlnat u q]. *)

Definition ehlnat_pp {X} {a : X} (u : idpath a = idpath a) {v w : idpath a = idpath a} (p : v = 1) (q : 1 = w)
  : (ehlnat u p [-] ehlnat u q) @ whiskerL _ (whiskerR_pp _ p q)^ =
  (whiskerR (whiskerL_pp _ p q)^ _) @ ehlnat u (p @ q).

goals.conclusion:
(ehlnat u p [-] ehlnat u q) @ whiskerL (eh u v) (whiskerR_pp u p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u p q)^ (eh u w) @ ehlnat u (p @ q)

(ehlnat u p [-] ehlnat u q) @ whiskerL (eh u v) (whiskerR_pp u p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u p q)^ (eh u w) @ ehlnat u (p @ q)

forall (v : 1 = 1) (p : v = 1),
(ehlnat u p [-] ehlnat u q) @ whiskerL (eh u v) (whiskerR_pp u p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u p q)^ (eh u w) @ ehlnat u (p @ q)

(fun (b : 1 = 1) (x : (fun y : 1 = 1 => y = 1) b) =>
 (ehlnat u x [-] ehlnat u q) @ whiskerL (eh u b) (whiskerR_pp u x q)^ =
 whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u x q)^ (eh u w) @ ehlnat u (x @ q)) 1
  (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1)

(ehlnat u (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) [-] ehlnat u 1) @
whiskerL (eh u 1) (whiskerR_pp u (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) 1)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) 1)^ (eh u 1) @
ehlnat u (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1 @ 1)

contents: (** We now prove that [ehrnat (p @ q) w] suitably relates to [ehrnat p w] and [ehrnat q w]. *)

Definition ehrnat_pp {X} {a : X} {u v : idpath a = idpath a} (p : u = 1) (q : 1 = v) (w : idpath a = idpath a)
  : (ehrnat p w [-] ehrnat q w) @ whiskerL _ (whiskerL_pp _ p q)^ =
  (whiskerR (whiskerR_pp _ p q)^ _) @ ehrnat (p @ q) w.

goals.conclusion:
(ehrnat p w [-] ehrnat q w) @ whiskerL (eh u w) (whiskerL_pp w p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp w p q)^ (eh v w) @ ehrnat (p @ q) w

(ehrnat p w [-] ehrnat q w) @ whiskerL (eh u w) (whiskerL_pp w p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp w p q)^ (eh v w) @ ehrnat (p @ q) w

forall (u : 1 = 1) (p : u = 1),
(ehrnat p w [-] ehrnat q w) @ whiskerL (eh u w) (whiskerL_pp w p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp w p q)^ (eh v w) @ ehrnat (p @ q) w

(fun (b : 1 = 1) (x : (fun y : 1 = 1 => y = 1) b) =>
 (ehrnat x w [-] ehrnat q w) @ whiskerL (eh b w) (whiskerL_pp w x q)^ =
 whiskerR (whiskerR_pp w x q)^ (eh v w) @ ehrnat (x @ q) w) 1
  (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1)

(ehrnat (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) w [-] ehrnat 1 w) @
whiskerL (eh 1 w) (whiskerL_pp w (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) 1)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerR_pp w (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1) 1)^ (eh 1 w) @
ehrnat (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1 @ 1) w

((concat_1p (eh 1 w) @ 1) @ (concat_p1 (eh 1 w))^
 [-] (concat_1p (eh 1 w) @ 1) @ (concat_p1 (eh 1 w))^) @
1 = 1 @ ((concat_1p (eh 1 w) @ 1) @ (concat_p1 (eh 1 w))^)

contents: (** We now prove that [wlrnat p (q @ r)] suitably relates to [wlrnat p q] and [wlrnat p r]. *)

Definition wlrnat_p_pp {X} {a b c : X} {u v w : a = b} {x y : b = c} (p : x = y) (q : u = v) (r : v = w)
  : (wlrnat p q [I] wlrnat p r) @ whiskerR (whiskerR_pp _ q r)^ _ =
  whiskerL _ (whiskerR_pp _ q r)^ @ wlrnat p (q @ r).

goals.conclusion:
(wlrnat p q [I] wlrnat p r) @ whiskerR (whiskerR_pp x q r)^ (whiskerL w p) =
whiskerL (whiskerL u p) (whiskerR_pp y q r)^ @ wlrnat p (q @ r)

(wlrnat p q [I] wlrnat p r) @ whiskerR (whiskerR_pp x q r)^ (whiskerL w p) =
whiskerL (whiskerL u p) (whiskerR_pp y q r)^ @ wlrnat p (q @ r)

contents: (** We now prove that [wlrnat (p @ q) r] suitably relates to [wlrnat p r] and [wlrnat q r]. *)

Definition wlrnat_pp_p {X} {a b c : X} {u v : a = b} {x y z : b = c} (p : x = y) (q : y = z) (r : u = v)
  : (wlrnat p r [-] wlrnat q r) @ whiskerL _ (whiskerL_pp _ p q)^ =
  whiskerR (whiskerL_pp _ p q)^ _ @ wlrnat (p @ q) r.

goals.conclusion:
(wlrnat p r [-] wlrnat q r) @ whiskerL (whiskerR r x) (whiskerL_pp v p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u p q)^ (whiskerR r z) @ wlrnat (p @ q) r

(wlrnat p r [-] wlrnat q r) @ whiskerL (whiskerR r x) (whiskerL_pp v p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp u p q)^ (whiskerR r z) @ wlrnat (p @ q) r

contents: (** We now prove that [wlrnat p q] suitably relates to [wlrnat q p]. *)

Definition wlrnat_V {X} {a : X} {u v x y : idpath a = idpath a} p q
  : whiskerR (wlrnat p q) (eh v y) @ (ehrnat q x [-] ehlnat v p) =
  (ehlnat u p [-] ehrnat q y) @ whiskerL (eh u x) (wlrnat q p)^.

goals.conclusion:
whiskerR (wlrnat p q) (eh v y) @ (ehrnat q x [-] ehlnat v p) =
(ehlnat u p [-] ehrnat q y) @ whiskerL (eh u x) (wlrnat q p)^

whiskerR (wlrnat p q) (eh v y) @ (ehrnat q x [-] ehlnat v p) =
(ehlnat u p [-] ehrnat q y) @ whiskerL (eh u x) (wlrnat q p)^

whiskerR (wlrnat 1 1) (eh u x) @ (ehrnat 1 x [-] ehlnat u 1) =
(ehlnat u 1 [-] ehrnat 1 x) @ whiskerL (eh u x) (wlrnat 1 1)^

contents: (** We now prove that [eh p (q @ r)] suitably relates to [eh p q] and [eh p r]. *)

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
let EH_x_yz :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
EH_x_yz @ (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2 @ whiskerL y1 EH_x_z^) =
(concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @ whiskerR EH_x_y z0) @ concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0

hypotheses.type:
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
let EH_x_yz :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
EH_x_yz @ (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2 @ whiskerL y1 EH_x_z^) =
(concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @ whiskerR EH_x_y z0) @ concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0

hypotheses.type:
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz

contents: apply moveR_Vp in H_urnat_yz0, H_urnat_yz1, H_wlrnat_x_yz.

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
let EH_x_yz :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
EH_x_yz @ (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2 @ whiskerL y1 EH_x_z^) =
(concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @ whiskerR EH_x_y z0) @ concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0

hypotheses.type:
(whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0)^ @
((wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2) = wlrnat_x_yz

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2) in
let EH_x_yz :=
  ((rlucancel_inv
      (ulnat_x0 [-] (whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0)))^ @
   ((whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0)^ @
    ((wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2))) @
  rlucancel_inv
    ((whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1) [-] ulnat_x2)

forall (wlx1 : a = b) (wlrnat_x_y : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1),
(fun (q : a = b) (s : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 let EH_x_y :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
 let EH_x_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ s) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in

   ((rlucancel_inv
       (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)))^ @
    ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((wlrnat_x_y [I] s) @ whiskerR 1 q))) @
   rlucancel_inv
     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1)
   in

 (concat_p_pp wlx0 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_y 1) @ concat_pp_p 1 wlx1 1) wlx1
  (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : a = b) (s : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : a = b) (s0 : q @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>

    in

let EH_x_y :=

  rlucancel_inv
    ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1)
  in
EH_x_yz @ (concat_pp_p 1 1 1 @ whiskerL 1 EH_x_z^) =
(concat_p_pp 1 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_y 1) @ concat_pp_p 1 1 1

contents:
Theorem eh_p_pp {X} {a : X} (p q r : idpath a = idpath a)
  : eh p (q @ r) @ (concat_pp_p _ _ _ @ whiskerL _ (eh p r)^) =
  concat_p_pp _ _ _ @ whiskerR (eh p q) _ @ concat_pp_p _ _ _.

goals.conclusion:
eh p (q @ r) @ (concat_pp_p q r p @ whiskerL q (eh p r)^) =
(concat_p_pp p q r @ whiskerR (eh p q) r) @ concat_pp_p q p r

eh p (q @ r) @ (concat_pp_p q r p @ whiskerL q (eh p r)^) =
(concat_p_pp p q r @ whiskerR (eh p q) r) @ concat_pp_p q p r
urnat q [-] urnat r = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ urnat (q @ r)
urnat q [-] urnat r = whiskerR ?Goal0 1 @ urnat (q @ r)

(wlrnat p q [I] wlrnat p r) @ whiskerR ?Goal0 (whiskerL 1 p) =
whiskerL (whiskerL 1 p) ?Goal @ wlrnat p (q @ r)
urnat q [-] urnat r = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ urnat (q @ r)
urnat q [-] urnat r = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ urnat (q @ r)

(wlrnat p q [I] wlrnat p r) @ whiskerR (whiskerR_pp 1 q r)^ (whiskerL 1 p) =
whiskerL (whiskerL 1 p) (whiskerR_pp 1 q r)^ @ wlrnat p (q @ r)

contents: (** We now prove that "eh (p @ q) r" suitably relates to "eh p r" and "eh q r". *)

goals.conclusion:

       rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] s0) in
     let EH_xy_z :=
       ((rlucancel_inv ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s3 [-] s1) [-] s))^ @
        ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
       rlucancel_inv (urnat_z2 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s2 [-] s0)) in
     EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp z2 q2 q0 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ q0) =
     (concat_pp_p q3 q1 q @ whiskerL q3 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp q3 z1 q0) wlx0
      (rlucancel 1))
     wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
    wly0 (rlucancel 1))
   wly1 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz0 (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : b = e) (s : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : c = f) (s0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : e = f) (s1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : b = c) (s2 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : d = e) (s3 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : a = b) (s4 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      let EH_x_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv (s4 [-] s))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
        rlucancel_inv (urnat_z2 [-] s3) in
      let EH_y_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv (s2 [-] s0))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
        rlucancel_inv (s [-] s1) in
      let EH_xy_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s4 [-] s2) [-] s0))^ @
         ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @
          ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
        rlucancel_inv (urnat_z2 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s3 [-] s1)) in
      EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp z2 q3 q1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ q1) =
      (concat_pp_p q4 q2 q0 @ whiskerL q4 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp q4 q q1) wlx0
       (rlucancel 1))
      wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
     wly0 (rlucancel 1))
    wly1 (rlucancel 1))
   wrz0 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz1 (rlucancel 1)

forall (z2 : a = d) (urnat_z2 : wrz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2),
(fun (q : b = e) (s : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : c = f) (s0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : e = f) (s1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : b = c) (s2 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : d = e) (s3 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : a = b) (s4 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      let EH_x_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv (s4 [-] s))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
        rlucancel_inv (urnat_z2 [-] s3) in
      let EH_y_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv (s2 [-] s0))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
        rlucancel_inv (s [-] s1) in
      let EH_xy_z :=
        ((rlucancel_inv ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s4 [-] s2) [-] s0))^ @
         ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @
          ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
        rlucancel_inv (urnat_z2 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s3 [-] s1)) in
      EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp z2 q3 q1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ q1) =
      (concat_pp_p q4 q2 q0 @ whiskerL q4 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp q4 q q1) wlx0
       (rlucancel 1))
      wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
     wly0 (rlucancel 1))
    wly1 (rlucancel 1))
   wrz0 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz1 (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : a = d) (s : wrz2 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : b = e) (s0 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : c = f) (s1 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : e = f) (s2 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : b = c) (s3 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : d = e) (s4 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : a = b) (s5 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       let EH_x_z :=
         ((rlucancel_inv (s5 [-] s0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
         rlucancel_inv (s [-] s4) in
       let EH_y_z :=
         ((rlucancel_inv (s3 [-] s1))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
         rlucancel_inv (s0 [-] s2) in
       let EH_xy_z :=
         ((rlucancel_inv ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s5 [-] s3) [-] s1))^ @
          ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @
           ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
         rlucancel_inv (s [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s4 [-] s2)) in
       EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp q q4 q2 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ q2) =
       (concat_pp_p q5 q3 q1 @ whiskerL q5 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp q5 q0 q2)
        wlx0 (rlucancel 1))
       wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
      wly0 (rlucancel 1))
     wly1 (rlucancel 1))
    wrz0 (rlucancel 1))
   wrz1 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz2 (rlucancel 1)

let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_y_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_xy_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
   ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
  rlucancel_inv
    (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
  in
EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp wrz2 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
(concat_pp_p 1 1 wrz0 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 wrz1 1

forall (wrz2 : a = d) (wlrnat_x_z : 1 @ wrz1 = wrz2 @ 1),
let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_y_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_xy_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
   ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((wlrnat_x_z [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL wrz2 1))) @
  rlucancel_inv
    (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
  in
EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp wrz2 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
(concat_pp_p 1 1 wrz0 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 wrz1 1

(fun (q : a = d) (s : 1 @ wrz1 = q @ 1) =>
 let EH_x_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ s) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
 let EH_y_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
 let EH_xy_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
    ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((s [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL q 1))) @
   rlucancel_inv
     (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
   in
 EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp q 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
 (concat_pp_p 1 1 wrz0 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 wrz1 1) wrz1
  (lrucancel 1)

forall (wrz1 : a = d) (wlrnat_y_z : 1 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ 1),
(fun (q : a = d) (s : 1 @ wrz1 = q @ 1) =>
 let EH_x_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ s) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
 let EH_y_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ wlrnat_y_z) @
   rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
 let EH_xy_z :=
   ((rlucancel_inv
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
    ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((s [-] wlrnat_y_z) @ whiskerL q 1))) @
   rlucancel_inv
     (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
   in
 EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp q 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
 (concat_pp_p 1 1 wrz0 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 wrz1 1) wrz1
  (lrucancel 1)

(fun (q : a = d) (s : 1 @ wrz0 = q @ 1) =>
 (fun (q0 : a = d) (s0 : 1 @ q = q0 @ 1) =>
  let EH_x_z :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ s0) @
    rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
  let EH_y_z :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ s) @
    rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
  let EH_xy_z :=
    ((rlucancel_inv
        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
     ((whiskerR 1 wrz0)^ @ ((s0 [-] s) @ whiskerL q0 1))) @
    rlucancel_inv
      (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
    in
  EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp q0 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
  (concat_pp_p 1 1 wrz0 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 q 1) q
   (lrucancel 1))
  wrz0 (lrucancel 1)

let EH_x_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ lrucancel 1) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_y_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))^ @ lrucancel 1) @
  rlucancel_inv (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) in
let EH_xy_z :=
  ((rlucancel_inv
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) [-] rlucancel 1))^ @
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((lrucancel 1 [-] lrucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1))) @
  rlucancel_inv
    (rlucancel 1 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1))
  in
EH_xy_z @ (concat_p_pp 1 1 1 @ whiskerR EH_x_z^ 1) =
(concat_pp_p 1 1 1 @ whiskerL 1 EH_y_z) @ concat_p_pp 1 1 1

contents:
Theorem eh_pp_p {X} {a : X} (p q r : idpath a = idpath a)
  : eh (p @ q) r @ (concat_p_pp _ _ _ @ whiskerR (eh p r)^ _) =
  concat_pp_p _ _ _ @ whiskerL _ (eh q r) @ concat_p_pp _ _ _.

goals.conclusion:
eh (p @ q) r @ (concat_p_pp r p q @ whiskerR (eh p r)^ q) =
(concat_pp_p p q r @ whiskerL p (eh q r)) @ concat_p_pp p r q

eh (p @ q) r @ (concat_p_pp r p q @ whiskerR (eh p r)^ q) =
(concat_pp_p p q r @ whiskerL p (eh q r)) @ concat_p_pp p r q
ulnat p [-] ulnat q = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ ulnat (p @ q)
ulnat p [-] ulnat q = whiskerR ?Goal0 1 @ ulnat (p @ q)

(wlrnat p r [-] wlrnat q r) @ whiskerL (whiskerR r 1) ?Goal0 =
whiskerR ?Goal (whiskerR r 1) @ wlrnat (p @ q) r
ulnat p [-] ulnat q = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ ulnat (p @ q)
ulnat p [-] ulnat q = whiskerR ?Goal 1 @ ulnat (p @ q)

(wlrnat p r [-] wlrnat q r) @ whiskerL (whiskerR r 1) (whiskerL_pp 1 p q)^ =
whiskerR (whiskerL_pp 1 p q)^ (whiskerR r 1) @ wlrnat (p @ q) r

contents: (** The syllepsis: We now prove that "eh p q" is suitably related to "eh q p". *)

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
(ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
(ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 =
((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
(ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0) @ (wlrnat_x_y @ (concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^) =
((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
(ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
wlrnat_x_y =
((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
 (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
  (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

hypotheses.type:
((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
 (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
  (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^ = wlrnat_x_y

goals.conclusion:
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @
   (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
     (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
      (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
    ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

forall ulnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0,
(ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
let EH_x_y :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @
   (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
     (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
      (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
    ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
let EH_y_x :=
  ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
  rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1

(fun (q : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (_ : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 let EH_x_y :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (q [-] urnat_y0))^ @
    (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
      (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
       (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
     ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
   rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
 let EH_y_x :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
   rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
 EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1) (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1)

forall ulnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1,
(ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(fun (q : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (_ : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 let EH_x_y :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (q [-] urnat_y0))^ @
    (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
      (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
       (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
     ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
   rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1) in
 let EH_y_x :=
   ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
   rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
 EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1) (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (_ : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (_ : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  let EH_x_y :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (q0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @
     (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
       (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
        (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
      ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
    rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] q) in
  let EH_y_x :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
    rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
  EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1) (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
  (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1)

forall urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0,
(ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
(fun (q : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (_ : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (_ : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  let EH_x_y :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (q0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @
     (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
       (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
        (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
      ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^)) @
    rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] q) in
  let EH_y_x :=
    ((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
    rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0) in
  EH_x_y @ EH_y_x = 1) (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
  (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (_ : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>

  (fun (q1 : a0 = b0) (s1 : q @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((s [-] ehrnat_z) @ whiskerL 1 1)
    [I] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s1 [-] s0)) @
   whiskerR 1 (q1 @ q0) =
   whiskerL (wry @ wrz) 1 @
   ((whiskerR 1 (1 @ 1))^ @
    (1^ @ ((s [I] s1) @ whiskerR 1 q1)
     [-] (whiskerL wrz 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_z [I] s0) @ 1))))
    q (rlucancel 1))
   wlz (rlucancel 1))
  wry (rlucancel 1)

forall (wlz : b0 = c0) (ehrnat_z : wrz @ 1 = 1 @ wlz),
(fun (q : a0 = b0) (s : wry @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : b0 = c0) (s0 : wlz @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : a0 = b0) (s1 : q @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((s [-] ehrnat_z) @ whiskerL 1 1)
    [I] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s1 [-] s0)) @
   whiskerR 1 (q1 @ q0) =
   whiskerL (wry @ wrz) 1 @
   ((whiskerR 1 (1 @ 1))^ @
    (1^ @ ((s [I] s1) @ whiskerR 1 q1)
     [-] (whiskerL wrz 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_z [I] s0) @ 1))))
    q (rlucancel 1))
   wlz (rlucancel 1))
  wry (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : b0 = c0) (s : wrz @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : a0 = b0) (s0 : wry @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : b0 = c0) (s1 : q @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : a0 = b0) (s2 : q0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((s0 [-] s) @ whiskerL 1 1)
     [I] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s2 [-] s1)) @
    whiskerR 1 (q2 @ q1) =
    whiskerL (wry @ wrz) 1 @
    ((whiskerR 1 (1 @ 1))^ @

      [-] (whiskerL wrz 1)^ @ ((s [I] s1) @ 1))))
     q0 (rlucancel 1))
    q (rlucancel 1))
   wry (rlucancel 1))
  wrz (rlucancel 1)

((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
 [I] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)) @
whiskerR 1 (1 @ 1) =
whiskerL (1 @ 1) 1 @
((whiskerR 1 (1 @ 1))^ @
 (1^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [I] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerR 1 1)

contents:
Definition ehrnat_p1_pp {X} {a : X} {u v : idpath a = idpath a} (q : u = 1) (r : 1 = v)
  : Ehrnat_p1_pp (eh_p1 u) (eh_p1 v) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) (ulnat_pp q r) (urnat_pp q r)
    (ehrnat_p1 q) (ehrnat_p1 r) =
  ehrnat_p1 (q @ r).

goals.conclusion:
Ehrnat_p1_pp (eh_p1 u) (eh_p1 v) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (ulnat_pp q r) (urnat_pp q r) (ehrnat_p1 q) (ehrnat_p1 r) =
ehrnat_p1 (q @ r)

Ehrnat_p1_pp (eh_p1 u) (eh_p1 v) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (ulnat_pp q r) (urnat_pp q r) (ehrnat_p1 q) (ehrnat_p1 r) =
ehrnat_p1 (q @ r)

forall (u : 1 = 1) (q : u = 1),
Ehrnat_p1_pp (eh_p1 u) (eh_p1 v) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (ulnat_pp q r) (urnat_pp q r) (ehrnat_p1 q) (ehrnat_p1 r) =
ehrnat_p1 (q @ r)

(fun (b : 1 = 1) (x : (fun y : 1 = 1 => y = 1) b) =>
 Ehrnat_p1_pp (eh_p1 b) (eh_p1 v) (ehrnat_pp x r 1) 
   (ulnat_pp x r) (urnat_pp x r) (ehrnat_p1 x) (ehrnat_p1 r) =
 ehrnat_p1 (x @ r)) 1 (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1)

        ((whiskerR 1 q2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL q4 1))^)
       wlx0 (rlucancel 1))
      wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
     wlx2 (rlucancel 1))
    wry0 (rlucancel 1))
   wry1 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz0 (rlucancel 1)

(fun (q : c0 = e0) (s : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : d0 = f0) (s0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : a0 = c0) (s1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : b0 = d0) (s2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : e0 = f0) (s3 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : c0 = d0) (s4 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : a0 = b0) (s5 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       forall (wlrnat_y_x : q1 @ q4 = q5 @ q2)
       (wlrnat_z_x : q @ q3 = q4 @ q0),
       whiskerR
         ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @
          ((((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ wry0))^ @
             (((s5 [-] s2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @ (s1 [-] s4)^)) @
            ((concat_p1 (wry1 @ wlx1))^)^
            [I] ((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ wrz0))^ @
                 (((s4 [-] s0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @ (s [-] s3)^)) @
                ((concat_p1 (wrz1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
           whiskerR 1 wlx2))
         1 @
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((s1 [-] s) @ whiskerL 1 1) [-] s3) =
       (s5 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((s2 [-] s0) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
       whiskerL 1
         ((whiskerR 1 q3)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL q5 1))^)
        wlx0 (rlucancel 1))
       wlx1 (rlucancel 1))
      wlx2 (rlucancel 1))
     wry0 (rlucancel 1))
    wry1 (rlucancel 1))
   wrz0 (rlucancel 1))
  wrz1 (rlucancel 1)

forall (wlrnat_y_x : 1 @ wlx1 = wlx0 @ 1) (wlrnat_z_x : 1 @ wlx2 = wlx1 @ 1),
whiskerR
  ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @
   ((((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
      (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
       (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
     ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))^)^
     [I] ((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
          (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
           (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
         ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
    whiskerR 1 wlx2))
  1 @
((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
 [-] rlucancel 1) =
(rlucancel 1
 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
whiskerL 1
  ((whiskerR 1 wlx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wlx0 1))^

forall (wlx0 : a0 = b0) (wlrnat_y_x : 1 @ wlx1 = wlx0 @ 1)
(wlrnat_z_x : 1 @ wlx2 = wlx1 @ 1),
whiskerR
  ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @
   ((((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
      (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
       (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
     ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))^)^
     [I] ((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
          (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
           (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
         ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
    whiskerR 1 wlx2))
  1 @
((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
 [-] rlucancel 1) =
(rlucancel 1
 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
whiskerL 1
  ((whiskerR 1 wlx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wlx0 1))^

(fun (q : a0 = b0) (s : 1 @ wlx1 = q @ 1) =>
 forall wlrnat_z_x : 1 @ wlx2 = wlx1 @ 1,
 whiskerR
   ((whiskerL q 1)^ @
    ((((concat_p1 (q @ 1))^ @
       (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 s^) @
        (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
      ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))^)^
      [I] ((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
           (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
            (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
          ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
     whiskerR 1 wlx2))
   1 @
 ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
  [-] rlucancel 1) =
 (rlucancel 1
  [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
 whiskerL 1 ((whiskerR 1 wlx2)^ @ ((s [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL q 1))^) wlx1
  (lrucancel 1)

forall wlx1 : a0 = b0,
(fun (q : a0 = b0) (s : 1 @ wlx1 = q @ 1) =>
 forall wlrnat_z_x : 1 @ wlx2 = wlx1 @ 1,
 whiskerR
   ((whiskerL q 1)^ @
    ((((concat_p1 (q @ 1))^ @
       (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 s^) @
        (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
      ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))^)^
      [I] ((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
           (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
            (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
          ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
     whiskerR 1 wlx2))
   1 @
 ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
  [-] rlucancel 1) =
 (rlucancel 1
  [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
 whiskerL 1 ((whiskerR 1 wlx2)^ @ ((s [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL q 1))^) wlx1
  (lrucancel 1)

(fun (q : a0 = b0) (s : 1 @ wlx2 = q @ 1) =>
 whiskerR
   ((whiskerL q 1)^ @
    ((((concat_p1 (q @ 1))^ @
       (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 (lrucancel 1)^) @
        (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
      ((concat_p1 (1 @ q))^)^
      [I] ((concat_p1 (q @ 1))^ @
           (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 s^) @
            (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
          ((concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))^)^) @
     whiskerR 1 wlx2))
   1 @
 ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
  [-] rlucancel 1) =
 (rlucancel 1
  [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
 whiskerL 1 ((whiskerR 1 wlx2)^ @ ((lrucancel 1 [-] s) @ whiskerL q 1))^)
  wlx2 (lrucancel 1)

whiskerR
  ((whiskerL 1 1)^ @
   ((((concat_p1 (1 @ 1))^ @
      (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 (lrucancel 1)^) @
       (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
     ((concat_p1 (1 @ 1))^)^
     [I] ((concat_p1 (1 @ 1))^ @
          (((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 (lrucancel 1)^) @
           (rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1)^)) @
         ((concat_p1 (1 @ 1))^)^) @
    whiskerR 1 1))
  1 @
((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)
 [-] rlucancel 1) =
(rlucancel 1
 [-] (whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((rlucancel 1 [-] rlucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1)) @
whiskerL 1
  ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((lrucancel 1 [-] lrucancel 1) @ whiskerL 1 1))^

Definition wlrnat_V_p_pp {X} {a : X} {u v w : idpath a = idpath a} (p : 1 = w) (q : u = 1) (r : 1 = v)
  : Wlrnat_V_p_pp (ehrnat_pp q r _) (ehrnat_pp q r _) (wlrnat_p_pp p q r) (wlrnat_pp_p q r p)
    (wlrnat_V p q) (wlrnat_V p r) =
  wlrnat_V p (q @ r).

goals.conclusion:
Wlrnat_V_p_pp (ehrnat_pp q r w) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (wlrnat_p_pp p q r) (wlrnat_pp_p q r p) (wlrnat_V p q) 
  (wlrnat_V p r) =
wlrnat_V p (q @ r)

Wlrnat_V_p_pp (ehrnat_pp q r w) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (wlrnat_p_pp p q r) (wlrnat_pp_p q r p) (wlrnat_V p q) 
  (wlrnat_V p r) =
wlrnat_V p (q @ r)

forall (u : 1 = 1) (q : u = 1),
Wlrnat_V_p_pp (ehrnat_pp q r w) (ehrnat_pp q r 1) 
  (wlrnat_p_pp p q r) (wlrnat_pp_p q r p) (wlrnat_V p q) 
  (wlrnat_V p r) =
wlrnat_V p (q @ r)

(fun (b : 1 = 1) (x : (fun y : 1 = 1 => y = 1) b) =>
 Wlrnat_V_p_pp (ehrnat_pp x r w) (ehrnat_pp x r 1) 
   (wlrnat_p_pp p x r) (wlrnat_pp_p x r p) (wlrnat_V p x) 
   (wlrnat_V p r) =
 wlrnat_V p (x @ r)) 1 (equiv_path_inverse 1 1 1)

contents:
(** Next we prove a coherence law relating [eh_V p (q @ r)] to [eh_V p q] and [eh_V p r]. *)

(* The following tactics will be used to make the proof faster, but with only minor modifications, the proof goes through without these tactics. The final tactic [generalize_goal] takes a goal of the form [forall a b c ..., expression] and asserts a new goal [forall P, _ -> forall a b c ..., P a b c ...] which can be used to prove the original goal. During the proof, the underscore gets replaced by a special case of [P].  Because [expression] has been replaced with a generic function, the proof of the new goal can be more efficient than the proof of the special case, especially when there are around 84 variables. *)

(* This can be done with Ltac1, but is a bit faster with Ltac2.  See the git history for the Ltac1 version. *)

Ltac2 rec replace_under_prod (ty : constr) (final : constr) :=
  match Constr.Unsafe.kind ty with
  | Constr.Unsafe.Prod a ty
    => Constr.Unsafe.make (Constr.Unsafe.Prod a (replace_under_prod ty final))
  | _ => final
  end.

Ltac2 rec count_prod (ty : constr) :=
  match Constr.Unsafe.kind ty with
  | Constr.Unsafe.Prod _ ty => Int.add 1 (count_prod ty)
  | _ => 0
  end.

Ltac2 apply_P_on (p : constr) (n : int) :=
  Constr.Unsafe.make
    (Constr.Unsafe.App
       p
       (Array.init
          n
          (fun i => Constr.Unsafe.make (Constr.Unsafe.Rel (Int.sub n i))))).

Ltac2 apply_P (ty : constr) (p : int -> constr) :=
  let n := count_prod ty in
  replace_under_prod ty (apply_P_on (p n) n).

Ltac2 make_P_and_evars (ty : constr) :=
  let p_ty := make_P ty in
  let res := apply_P ty (fun n => Constr.Unsafe.make (Constr.Unsafe.Rel (Int.add n 1))) in
  '(forall P : $p_ty, _ -> $res).

Ltac make_P_and_evars :=
  ltac2:(ty |- Control.refine (fun _ => make_P_and_evars (Option.get (Ltac1.to_constr ty)))).

Ltac generalize_goal X :=
  match goal with |- ?G =>
                    let T := open_constr:(ltac:(make_P_and_evars G)) in
                    assert (X : T) end.
(* We need this equivalence twice below. *)

Local Lemma equiv_helper {X} {a b : X} {p q r : a = b} (t : q @ 1 = r) (u : p @ 1 = r) (s : p = q)
  : ((concat_p1 p)^ @ (u @ t^)) @ (concat_p1 q) = s
    <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u.

goals.conclusion: ((concat_p1 p)^ @ (u @ t^)) @ concat_p1 q = s <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u
((concat_p1 p)^ @ (u @ t^)) @ concat_p1 q = s <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u
s = ((concat_p1 p)^ @ (u @ t^)) @ concat_p1 q <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u
s @ (concat_p1 q)^ = (concat_p1 p)^ @ (u @ t^) <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u
concat_p1 p @ (s @ (concat_p1 q)^) = u @ t^ <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u
whiskerR s 1 = u @ t^ <~> whiskerR s 1 @ t = u

contents: (* This special case of [equiv_path_ind] comes up a lot. *)

Definition equiv_path_ind_moveL_Mp {X} (a b c : X) (p : a = c) (r : a = b)
           (P : forall (q : b = c), p = r @ q -> Type)
           (i : P (r^ @ p) (equiv_moveL_Mp _ _ _ 1))
  : forall (q : b = c) (s : p = r @ q), P q s.

goals.conclusion: forall (q : b = c) (s : p = r @ q), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : b = c, p = r @ q -> Type

goals.conclusion: forall (q : b = c) (s : p = r @ q), P q s

hypotheses.type: forall q : b = c, p = r @ q -> Type

contents: (* A form of the coherence we can prove by path induction. *)

goals.conclusion:
let eh_x_y :=
  concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @
  whiskerR
    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
    z0
  in
(((whiskerR
     (concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2)) @@
      concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_yz1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_yz_x) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_yz0)))
     eh_x_y @
   whiskerR
     (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_yz0 ehrnat_p1_yz1
        wlrnat_V_x_yz)
     eh_x_y) @
  lrucancel 1) @
 whiskerL eh_x_y (concat_pp_p_p_pp y1 x1 z0)^) @
whiskerL eh_x_y
  (concat_p1 (concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0) @@ concat_p1 (concat_p_pp y1 x1 z0))^ =
(eh_p_pp_gen H_urnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz
 [-] lrucancel
       (whiskerL (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2)
          (ap (fun p : z1 @ x2 = x1 @ z0 => whiskerL y1 p)
             (moveL_V1
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_z1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_z_x) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_x1 [-] ulnat_z0))
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2))
                (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x1 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1
                   wlrnat_V_x_z)))))
[-] (eh_pp_p_gen H_ulnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz0 H_wlrnat_yz_x
     [-] lrucancel
           (whiskerL (concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0)
              (ap (fun p : x0 @ y0 = y1 @ x1 => whiskerR p z0)
                 (moveL_1V
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0))
                    (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x1 ehrnat_p1_y0
                       ehrnat_p1_y1 wlrnat_V_x_y)))))

hypotheses.type:
(ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0

(ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1

(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz

(wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx2 @ wlrnat_yz_x

whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
(ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^

whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
(ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^

whiskerR wlrnat_x_yz 1 @ (ehrnat_yz1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
(ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_yz0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_yz_x^

Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ulnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz0 ehrnat_p1_y0
  ehrnat_p1_z0 =
ehrnat_p1_yz0

Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz1 H_urnat_yz1 ehrnat_p1_y1
  ehrnat_p1_z1 =
ehrnat_p1_yz1

Wlrnat_V_p_pp H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz H_wlrnat_yz_x
  wlrnat_V_x_y wlrnat_V_x_z =
wlrnat_V_x_yz

goals.conclusion:
let eh_x_y :=
  concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @
  whiskerR
    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
    z0
  in
(((whiskerR
     (concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2)) @@
      concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_yz1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_yz_x) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_yz0)))
     eh_x_y @
   whiskerR
     (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_yz0 ehrnat_p1_yz1
        wlrnat_V_x_yz)
     eh_x_y) @
  lrucancel 1) @
 whiskerL eh_x_y (concat_pp_p_p_pp y1 x1 z0)^) @
whiskerL eh_x_y
  (concat_p1 (concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0) @@ concat_p1 (concat_p_pp y1 x1 z0))^ =
(eh_p_pp_gen H_urnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz
 [-] lrucancel
       (whiskerL (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2)
          (ap (fun p : z1 @ x2 = x1 @ z0 => whiskerL y1 p)
             (moveL_V1
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_z1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_z_x) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_x1 [-] ulnat_z0))
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2))
                (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x1 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1
                   wlrnat_V_x_z)))))
[-] (eh_pp_p_gen H_ulnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz0 H_wlrnat_yz_x
     [-] lrucancel
           (whiskerL (concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0)
              (ap (fun p : x0 @ y0 = y1 @ x1 => whiskerR p z0)
                 (moveL_1V
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0))
                    (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x1 ehrnat_p1_y0
                       ehrnat_p1_y1 wlrnat_V_x_y)))))

hypotheses.type:
(ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0

(ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =

Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ulnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz0 ehrnat_p1_y0
  ehrnat_p1_z0 =
ehrnat_p1_yz0

  ehrnat_p1_z1 =
ehrnat_p1_yz1

Wlrnat_V_p_pp H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz H_wlrnat_yz_x
  wlrnat_V_x_y wlrnat_V_x_z =

contents: (* For some reason, it's most efficient to destruct a few things here but the rest within the subgoal. *)

goals.conclusion:
let eh_x_y :=
  concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @
  whiskerR
    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
    z0
  in
(((whiskerR
     (concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2)) @@
      concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_yz1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_yz_x) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_yz0)))
     eh_x_y @
   whiskerR
     (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x2
        (Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ulnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz0 ehrnat_p1_y0
           ehrnat_p1_z0)
        (Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz1 H_urnat_yz1 ehrnat_p1_y1
           ehrnat_p1_z1)
        (Wlrnat_V_p_pp H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz H_wlrnat_yz_x
           wlrnat_V_x_y wlrnat_V_x_z))
     eh_x_y) @
  lrucancel 1) @
 whiskerL eh_x_y (concat_pp_p_p_pp y1 x1 z0)^) @
whiskerL eh_x_y
  (concat_p1 (concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0) @@ concat_p1 (concat_p_pp y1 x1 z0))^ =
(eh_p_pp_gen H_urnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz
 [-] lrucancel
       (whiskerL (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2)
          (ap (fun p : z1 @ x2 = x1 @ z0 => whiskerL y1 p)
             (moveL_V1
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_z1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_z_x) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_x1 [-] ulnat_z0))
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2))
                (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x1 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1
                   wlrnat_V_x_z)))))
[-] (eh_pp_p_gen H_ulnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz0 H_wlrnat_yz_x
     [-] lrucancel
           (whiskerL (concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0)
              (ap (fun p : x0 @ y0 = y1 @ x1 => whiskerR p z0)
                 (moveL_1V
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0))
                    (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x1 ehrnat_p1_y0
                       ehrnat_p1_y1 wlrnat_V_x_y)))))

hypotheses.type:
(ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0

(ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1

(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz

(wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx2 @ wlrnat_yz_x

whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
(ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^

whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
(ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^

contents: (* For efficiency purposes, we generalize the goal to an arbitrary function [P] of the context (except for [X] and [a]), and do all of the induction steps in this generality.  This reduces the size of the term that Coq needs to manipulate, speeding up the proof.  The same proof works with the next three lines removed and with the second and third last lines removed. *)

goals.conclusion:
forall (b c d e f : X) (wlx0 x0 wrx0 : a = b) (wlx1 x1 wrx1 : c = d)
(wlx2 x2 wrx2 : e = f) (wly0 y0 wry0 : b = d) (wly1 y1 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz0 z0 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz1 z1 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
(urnat_x0 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (ulnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
(urnat_x1 : wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (ulnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
(urnat_x2 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (ulnat_y0 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (ulnat_y1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (ulnat_z0 : wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (ulnat_z1 : wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1)
(urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1)) (ehlnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0)
(ehlnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1) (ehlnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2)
(ehrnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0) (ehrnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1)
(ehrnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0) (ehrnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx0 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx1)
(wlrnat_y_x : wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx1 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx2)
(wlrnat_z_x : wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx0 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx2)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly0 @ wlz0 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly1 @ wlz1 = wlyz1)
(H_ulnat_yz0 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0)
(H_urnat_yz0 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0)
(H_ulnat_yz1 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1)
(H_urnat_yz1 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1)
(H_ehrnat_yz0 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
                whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0)
(H_ehrnat_yz1 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
                whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1)
(H_wlrnat_x_yz : (wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
                 whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz)
(H_wlrnat_yz_x : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 wlpp_yz0 =
                 whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx2 @ wlrnat_yz_x)
(ehlnat_1p_x0 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0)
(ehlnat_1p_x1 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1)
(ehlnat_1p_x2 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2)
(ehrnat_p1_y0 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0)
(ehrnat_p1_y1 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1)
(ehrnat_p1_z0 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0)
(ehrnat_p1_z1 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1)
(wlrnat_V_x_y : whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
                (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
(wlrnat_V_x_z : whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^),
let eh_x_y :=
  concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0 @
  whiskerR
    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
    z0
  in
(((whiskerR
     (concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_yz0))^ @ wlrnat_x_yz) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_yz1 [-] ulnat_x2)) @@
      concat_p1
        (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_yz1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_yz_x) @
         rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_yz0)))
     eh_x_y @
   whiskerR
     (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x2
        (Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ulnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz0 ehrnat_p1_y0
           ehrnat_p1_z0)
        (Ehrnat_p1_pp 1 1 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz1 H_urnat_yz1 ehrnat_p1_y1
           ehrnat_p1_z1)
        (Wlrnat_V_p_pp H_ehrnat_yz0 H_ehrnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz H_wlrnat_yz_x
           wlrnat_V_x_y wlrnat_V_x_z))
     eh_x_y) @
  lrucancel 1) @
 whiskerL eh_x_y (concat_pp_p_p_pp y1 x1 z0)^) @
whiskerL eh_x_y
  (concat_p1 (concat_pp_p y1 x1 z0) @@ concat_p1 (concat_p_pp y1 x1 z0))^ =
(eh_p_pp_gen H_urnat_yz0 H_urnat_yz1 H_wlrnat_x_yz
 [-] lrucancel
       (whiskerL (concat_pp_p y1 z1 x2)
          (ap (fun p : z1 @ x2 = x1 @ z0 => whiskerL y1 p)
             (moveL_V1
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_z1 [-] urnat_x2))^ @ wlrnat_z_x) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_x1 [-] ulnat_z0))
                (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x1 [-] urnat_z0))^ @ wlrnat_x_z) @
                 rlucancel_inv (urnat_z1 [-] ulnat_x2))
                (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x1 ehlnat_1p_x2 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1
                   wlrnat_V_x_z)))))
[-] (eh_pp_p_gen H_ulnat_yz1 H_ulnat_yz0 H_wlrnat_yz_x
     [-] lrucancel
           (whiskerL (concat_p_pp x0 y0 z0)
              (ap (fun p : x0 @ y0 = y1 @ x1 => whiskerR p z0)
                 (moveL_1V
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_x0 [-] urnat_y0))^ @ wlrnat_x_y) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_y1 [-] ulnat_x1))
                    (((rlucancel_inv (ulnat_y1 [-] urnat_x1))^ @ wlrnat_y_x) @
                     rlucancel_inv (urnat_x0 [-] ulnat_y0))
                    (eh_V_gen ehlnat_1p_x0 ehlnat_1p_x1 ehrnat_p1_y0
                       ehrnat_p1_y1 wlrnat_V_x_y)))))

forall
P : forall (b c d e f : X) (wlx0 x0 wrx0 : a = b) 
    (wlx1 x1 wrx1 : c = d) (wlx2 x2 wrx2 : e = f) 
    (wly0 y0 wry0 : b = d) (wly1 y1 wry1 : a = c) 
    (wlz0 z0 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz1 z1 wrz1 : c = e) 
    (wlyz0 wryz0 : b = f) (wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e)
    (ulnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (urnat_x0 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
    (ulnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (urnat_x1 : wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
    (ulnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (urnat_x2 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
    (ulnat_y0 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
    (ulnat_y1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
    (ulnat_z0 : wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0)
    (ulnat_z1 : wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1)
    (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
    (urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
    (ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
    (urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1)) (ehlnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0)
    (ehlnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1) (ehlnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2)
    (ehrnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0) (ehrnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1)
    (ehrnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0) (ehrnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1)
    (ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
    (wlrnat_x_y : wlx0 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx1)
    (wlrnat_y_x : wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0)
    (wlrnat_x_z : wlx1 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx2)
    (wlrnat_z_x : wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0)
    (wlrnat_x_yz : wlx0 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx2)
    (wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ wlyz0)
    (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0) (wlpp_yz0 : wly0 @ wlz0 = wlyz0)
    (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1) (wlpp_yz1 : wly1 @ wlz1 = wlyz1),
    ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
    urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
    ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
    urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
    (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
    whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
    (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
    whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
    (wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
    whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
    (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 wlpp_yz0 =
    whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx2 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
    (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
    (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
    (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
    (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
    (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1 ->
    (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0 ->
    (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1 ->
    whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
    (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^ ->
    whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
    (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^ -> Type,
?Goal ->
forall (b c d e f : X) (wlx0 x0 wrx0 : a = b) (wlx1 x1 wrx1 : c = d)
(wlx2 x2 wrx2 : e = f) (wly0 y0 wry0 : b = d) (wly1 y1 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz0 z0 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz1 z1 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
(urnat_x0 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (ulnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
(urnat_x1 : wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (ulnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
(urnat_x2 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (ulnat_y0 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (ulnat_y1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (ulnat_z0 : wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (ulnat_z1 : wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1)
(urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1)) (ehlnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0)
(ehlnat_x1 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1) (ehlnat_x2 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2)
(ehrnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0) (ehrnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1)
(ehrnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0) (ehrnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx0 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx1)
(wlrnat_y_x : wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx1 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx2)
(wlrnat_z_x : wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx0 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx2)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly0 @ wlz0 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly1 @ wlz1 = wlyz1)
(H_ulnat_yz0 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0)
(H_urnat_yz0 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0)
(H_ulnat_yz1 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1)
(H_urnat_yz1 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1)
(H_ehrnat_yz0 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
                whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0)
(H_ehrnat_yz1 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
                whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1)
(H_wlrnat_x_yz : (wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx2 =
                 whiskerL wlx0 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz)
(H_wlrnat_yz_x : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 wlpp_yz0 =
                 whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx2 @ wlrnat_yz_x)
(ehlnat_1p_x0 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0)
(ehlnat_1p_x1 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1)
(ehlnat_1p_x2 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2)
(ehrnat_p1_y0 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0)
(ehrnat_p1_y1 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1)
(ehrnat_p1_z0 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0)
(ehrnat_p1_z1 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1)
(wlrnat_V_x_y : whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
                (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
(wlrnat_V_x_z : whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^),
P b c d e f wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 wry0 wly1 y1 wry1
  wlz0 z0 wrz0 wlz1 z1 wrz1 wlyz0 wryz0 wlyz1 wryz1 ulnat_x0 urnat_x0
  ulnat_x1 urnat_x1 ulnat_x2 urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1
  ulnat_z0 urnat_z0 ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 ulnat_yz0 urnat_yz0 ulnat_yz1 urnat_yz1

   lrucancel (whiskerL _ (ap (fun p => whiskerR p r) (moveL_1V _ _ (eh_V p q))))).
